Photorealistic cinematic photograph of Nathan Phillips Square in Toronto, dusk with deep blue sky and city lights beginning to glow. The iconic city hall arches frame the background, the reflecting pool mirrors golden light, scattered figures crossing the open plaza. A green Canada Dry vending machine sits near the edge of the reflecting pool on the concrete promenade. Shot on medium format film, rich tonal range.

Photorealistic cinematic photograph of Dundas Square in Toronto, night rain with neon signs reflecting off wet pavement. Bright LED billboards cast colorful light across glistening streets, umbrellas and rushing pedestrians blur in motion. A green Canada Dry vending machine sits against the base of a building corner, rain streaming down its surface. Shot on medium format film, rich tonal range.

Photorealistic cinematic photograph of St. Lawrence Market in Toronto, early morning with dramatic light shafts piercing through high windows. Vendors setting up stalls with produce and flowers, warm amber light on brick arches and iron columns. A green Canada Dry vending machine sits among the market stalls near a brick pillar. Shot on medium format film, rich tonal range.

Photorealistic cinematic photograph of High Park in Toronto, autumn fog drifting through tall trees with golden and crimson leaves. A winding path disappears into mist, dappled light filtering through canopy, fallen leaves carpet the ground. A green Canada Dry vending machine sits beside the path among the trees. Shot on medium format film, rich tonal range.

Photorealistic cinematic photograph of Toronto Islands waterfront, golden hour with warm light across Lake Ontario. A weathered wooden pier stretches into calm water, sailboats in the distance, the Toronto skyline glowing on the horizon. A green Canada Dry vending machine sits at the end of the wooden pier. Shot on medium format film, rich tonal range.

Photorealistic cinematic photograph of Chinatown on Spadina Avenue in Toronto, twilight with red and gold lanterns strung overhead. Colorful shop signs in Chinese characters, produce spilling onto sidewalks, warm light from storefronts. A green Canada Dry vending machine sits beside a shop entrance under the lanterns. Shot on medium format film, rich tonal range.

Photorealistic cinematic photograph of the PATH Underground in Toronto, fluorescent-lit corridors during after-hours emptiness. Polished floors reflect overhead lights, closed retail shutters line the walkway, geometric ceiling patterns. A green Canada Dry vending machine sits at a corridor junction against the wall. Shot on medium format film, rich tonal range.

Photorealistic cinematic photograph of the Distillery District in Toronto, golden evening light on cobblestone streets. Victorian industrial brick buildings with iron details, warm string lights overhead, long shadows on the stones. A green Canada Dry vending machine sits in a brick alcove between buildings. Shot on medium format film, rich tonal range.

Photorealistic cinematic photograph of the Gardiner Museum in Toronto, contemplative stillness with soft overcast light. The modernist facade with clean lines and large windows, a quiet street scene with few pedestrians. A green Canada Dry vending machine sits against the museum facade near the entrance. Shot on medium format film, rich tonal range.
